query:
-- Current week: 24 June – 30 June (today is 24 June, insert Mon–Tue)
INSERT INTO daily_logs (userId, logDate, weight, sleepHours, sleepQuality, stressLevel, stepsCount, trainingCompleted, trainingType)
VALUES
  (1, '2026-06-24', 80.6, 7.5, 4, 2, 9200, 1, 'A'),
  (1, '2026-06-23', 80.8, 7.8, 4, 2, 8800, 0, NULL),
  (1, '2026-06-22', 81.0, 8.0, 4, 2, 10200, 1, 'B')
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
  weight = VALUES(weight),
  sleepHours = VALUES(sleepHours),
  sleepQuality = VALUES(sleepQuality),
  stressLevel = VALUES(stressLevel),
  stepsCount = VALUES(stepsCount),
  trainingCompleted = VALUES(trainingCompleted),
  trainingType = VALUES(trainingType);

-- Previous week: 17 June – 23 June (fill remaining days)
INSERT INTO daily_logs (userId, logDate, weight, sleepHours, sleepQuality, stressLevel, stepsCount, trainingCompleted, trainingType)
VALUES
  (1, '2026-06-21', 81.2, 7.2, 3, 3, 7800, 0, NULL),
  (1, '2026-06-20', 81.4, 6.8, 3, 3, 8500, 1, 'C'),
  (1, '2026-06-19', 81.6, 7.5, 4, 2, 9100, 0, NULL),
  (1, '2026-06-18', 81.8, 8.2, 4, 2, 8200, 1, 'A'),
  (1, '2026-06-17', 82.0, 7.0, 3, 3, 7600, 0, NULL)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
  weight = VALUES(weight),
  sleepHours = VALUES(sleepHours),
  sleepQuality = VALUES(sleepQuality),
  stressLevel = VALUES(stressLevel),
  stepsCount = VALUES(stepsCount),
  trainingCompleted = VALUES(trainingCompleted),
  trainingType = VALUES(trainingType);
